description_long: This is a rectangular bar of soap wrapped in a pink paper packaging with a white oval label on the top surface. The label features gold and white decorative elements, including a gold ribbon-like graphic and text indicating the product's name and qualities. The edges of the packaging are slightly crumpled, suggesting it has been handled but not opened. The soap's packaging includes a white band around the middle and additional gold accents, giving it a classic, feminine appearance. The text on the label is partially legible, with 'Beauty Soap' and other branding details visible. The overall look is soft, pastel, and designed to appeal to personal care consumers.
description: A pink, rectangular bar of soap wrapped in decorative paper with gold and white accents and a visible product label. The packaging is slightly crumpled, giving it a handled but unopened appearance.
description_view_0: The short end of the soap is visible, showing the pink wrapping with a gold seal and some crumpling at the corners.
description_view_1: The long side of the soap is shown, highlighting the white band and gold ribbon graphic, with more of the label text visible.
description_view_2: The opposite short end is visible, similar to view 0, with pink wrapping, a gold seal, and slight crumpling.
description_view_3: The top face of the soap is shown, displaying the main label with 'Beauty Soap' text, gold ribbon, and decorative elements.
attribute_packaging_design: Rectangular pink paper wrapping with a white oval label, gold ribbon graphic, and white band around the middle. Decorative gold and white text and accents add a classic, feminine touch.
